title: cylindropuntia × neoarbuscula
intro: Cylindropuntia × neoarbuscula, also known as the cylindrical cholla, is a type of cactus plant that is a hybrid of two species, specifically Cylindropuntia bigelovii and Cylindropuntia echinocarpa. The cylindrical cholla has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming the plant's extracts include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Cylindropuntia × neoarbuscula can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and benefits.
